description: 2-email review request sequence for TotalGuard Yard Care. Email 1 sent 24-48hrs after service completion (TG-13). Email 2 sent 7 days after Email 1 if no review detected (TG-18). Uses tg-review.html template.

emails.subject_b: How did we do on your {{last_service}}, {{first_name}}?
emails.preview_text: Your honest review helps other {{city}} families find reliable yard care.
emails.headline: How Did We Do?
emails.subheadline: Your {{last_service}} is complete — and your opinion means everything to us.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

We just finished your {{last_service}} and hope you're loving the results!

If our crew exceeded your expectations, would you take 30 seconds to share your experience on Google?

Here's why it matters: TotalGuard is a small, local company. We don't have a massive marketing budget or a national brand name. When someone in {{city}} searches for yard care, your review is what helps them find us — and trust us before they ever pick up the phone.

Every review from a real customer in {{city}} helps another family find a yard care company they can actually rely on. And honestly? Reading your words makes our entire week.

It takes 30 seconds:

  1. Tap the button below
  2. Pick your stars
  3. Write a sentence or two about your experience (or don't — stars alone help!)
  4. Hit submit

That's it. You'd be helping us more than you know.

Here's What Your {{city}} Neighbors Are Saying

"If you want your yard done right, TotalGuard is the company to call. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves."

— Maxi Schultz

"Total Guard Yard care exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and attention to detail. My yard has never looked better."

— Ian Fleck

"Outstanding service from start to finish. They did an A+ job on my lawn."

— Akshaj Arun

Not satisfied with something? Please don't leave a review — just reply to this email and tell Vance directly. I'll personally make it right. No questions asked.

review_showcase.text: If you want your yard done right, TotalGuard is the company to call. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves.
review_showcase.name: Maxi Schultz

review_showcase.text: Total Guard Yard care exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and attention to detail. My yard has never looked better.
review_showcase.name: Ian Fleck

review_showcase.text: Outstanding service from start to finish. They did an A+ job on my lawn.
review_showcase.name: Akshaj Arun

emails.goal: Get a Google review from the customer within 48 hours of service while satisfaction is highest, using social proof and a low-friction ask with a safety valve for unhappy customers

emails.delay: 7 days after review_1 if no new review detected
emails.subject_b: Your {{city}} neighbors would love to hear from you
emails.preview_text: We have 78+ reviews but yours would mean the most right now.
emails.headline: One Last Ask
emails.subheadline: We'll keep this short — we know you're busy.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

I know you're busy, and I promise this is the last time I'll ask.

We sent you a note last week about leaving a quick Google review, and I wanted to follow up one more time — because your review genuinely matters more than you might think.

Here's the truth: we have 78+ reviews and a 4.9-star rating. That's incredible, and we're grateful for every single one. But the algorithm favors recent reviews. A review from you today carries more weight than a review from six months ago.

It literally takes 30 seconds:

  1. Tap the button below
  2. Pick your stars (even just a star rating helps — no words required)
  3. Write a sentence if you feel like it
  4. Hit submit

That's it. Done. You'll have helped a local {{city}} business more than any ad or marketing campaign ever could.

Thank you, {{first_name}}. We appreciate you either way.

— Vance & the TotalGuard crew
emails.goal: Final gentle nudge for a Google review, emphasizing simplicity and the impact of recent reviews on local search ranking

sequence_logic.email_2_trigger: TG-18 fires 7 days after email_1 if no new Google review detected from that customer
sequence_logic.max_sends_per_customer: 1 sequence per service completion, max 1 active sequence at a time
sequence_logic.suppression: Suppress if customer left a review in the last 30 days
